question: Which income segment appears to account for the largest share in the most recent year shown?

options.A: The green segment (Middle income) shows the largest share.
options.B: The purple segment (High income) shows the largest share.
options.C: Cannot determine which income segment has the largest share without a legend to explain what each color represents.
options.D: The red segment (Upper-middle income) shows the largest share.

explanation: The chart displays different colored segments but provides no legend to identify which color corresponds to which category. Without a legend it is impossible to determine which specific category has the largest share; options that assign a category to a color are guessing.
